no_favorites.title: Alaa ko woni ɗoo tawo :(
no_favorites.subtitle: Ɓeydu heen ɓure ɓurɗe yiɗeede e hello njiylawu ngam yiyde ɗe ɗoo

local_list.title: Resooji am Hisnaaɗi
local_list.description: Ngalu ngu resndu-ɗaa ɗoo ina mooftaa e feerorde maa. Naat ngam jogaade ɗi e nder kaɓirɗe.
local_list.empty_description: Ɓoɗɗu nate ɓernde e kala resource ngam ɓeydude ɗum ɗoo. Suɓagol maa ina hisnee e ndee feerorde.

purge_list.label: Laɓɓin fof
purge_list.confirm_description: Ɗuum maa ittu denndaangal kaɓirɗe e doggol ngol. Doggol ngol e hoore mum maa heddo.

print_dialog.title: Reggindo tappirde
print_dialog.phone_book_desc: Format compact e kabaruuji jokkondirɗi potɗi
print_dialog.popup_blocked: Popup oo haɗaama. Tiiɗno, accu popups ngam yiyde PDF.
print_dialog.error: Waawaa feewnude PDF. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.

print_footer_disclaimer: {{brandName}} ina rokka ɗeen kabaruuji no gollal laamu nii, tee alaa ko rokkata ɗum so wonaa laaɓal mum, timmugol mum, walla sahaa mum. {{brandName}} alaa ko toppitii so wonaa no ɗeen kabaruuji kuutortee, tee alaa ko toppitii so wonaa batte kuutoragol mum en. Feccere ndee winndannde firtaani ko {{brandName}} jaɓi walla jokkondiri e mum.

tooltips.purge: Laɓɓin denndaangal ɓurɓe yiɗeede e ndee doggol
